case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. IZZY'S ENTERPRISES INC et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-25-2007 CONTINUED TO SEP-05-2007 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AGAINST DEFENDANT ISIDOROS FRANGAKIS AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). JUL-25-2007 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IZZY'S ENTERPRISES INC POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1USED 2000 KENWORTH W900; FAIR MARKET VALUE - $10,000.00, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $6,186.40 DAMAGES, $2,325.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $375.63 COSTS, $515.49 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,402.52, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH - RE: EQUIPMENT; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON MAY-08-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
